scales.name: Character's Character Evolution
scales.description: Measures the internal moral compass and developmental growth of a character.

levels.label: Saintly
levels.description: Acts of supreme altruism and moral clarity.

levels.label: Heroic
levels.description: Principled behavior and positive community impact.

levels.label: Antagonistic
levels.description: Self-serving actions, beginning of moral decay.

levels.label: Pure Evil
levels.description: Total abandonment of empathy; destructive nature.

scales.name: Character Fortune
scales.description: Measures the external well-being, luck, and life quality of a character.

levels.label: Miraculous
levels.description: Peak prosperity, incredible luck, or divine favor.

levels.label: Prosperous
levels.description: Abundance of opportunities and stable health.

levels.label: Stable
levels.description: Ordinary life; balance of minor ups and downs.

levels.label: Adversity
levels.description: Hardship, loss of family/status, or chronic ill-luck.

levels.label: Catastrophic
levels.description: Absolute rock bottom; total loss of agency or life.

scales.name: Place Prosperity & Condition
scales.description: Measures the structural integrity, economical prosperity, and spiritual health of a location.

levels.label: Glorious
levels.description: Peak prosperity, golden era, legendary status.

levels.label: Thriving
levels.description: Rapid growth, safe borders, and happy population.

levels.label: Average
levels.description: Stable condition, routine maintenance, neither booming nor decaying.

levels.label: Decaying
levels.description: Economic decline, crumbling infrastructure, sense of being forgotten.

levels.label: Ruined
levels.description: Major structural damage, abandoned sectors, high danger.

levels.label: Annulled
levels.description: Total destruction, erased from history, uninhabitable wasteland.
